blocks.name: Particle system
blocks.comments: additive blend mode with darker colors to allow for flares when many particles overlap

blocks.name: Update position
blocks.comments: add new scaled direction to previous position

blocks.name: Create particle
blocks.comments: create particle with initial parameters

blocks.name: Add
blocks.comments: new position for particle this frame

blocks.name: Sphere shape
blocks.comments: use small sphere for emission

blocks.name: Update flow map
blocks.comments: update particle vector based on flowmap influence

blocks.name: flowMapTexture
blocks.comments: direction influence per channel

blocks.name: Update attractor
blocks.comments: animated attractor

blocks.name: attractor0_position
blocks.comments: position animated in code

blocks.name: Color4
blocks.comments: color in center of screen

blocks.name: Color4
blocks.comments: start and end life rendering in black

blocks.name: Update color
blocks.comments: change color based on age and position

blocks.name: Color4
blocks.comments: initially render particle with black so it is invisible

blocks.name: Float
blocks.comments: static strength for particle flow

blocks.name: attractor0_strength
blocks.comments: constant strength

blocks.name: Update size
blocks.comments: resize based on age

blocks.name: Gradient
blocks.comments: update size based on age to get large in the middle of the lifetime

blocks.name: Clamp
blocks.comments: clamp Z value to keep particles from traveling behind camera

blocks.name: Converter
blocks.comments: assemble new position with clamped Z to update position

blocks.name: Random
blocks.comments: choose random starting angle

blocks.name: Update angle
blocks.comments: rotate particle

blocks.name: Random
blocks.comments: choose rotation speed once per particle

blocks.name: Add
blocks.comments: add per particle rotation to current angle

blocks.name: attractor1_position
blocks.comments: position set in code at click location

blocks.name: Update attractor
blocks.comments: attractor for click/tap

blocks.name: attractor1_strength
blocks.comments: strength set in code on click

blocks.name: Max
blocks.comments: determine max value to create radius

blocks.name: Abs
blocks.comments: absolute postion value

blocks.name: SmoothStep
blocks.comments: create gradient mask for color blend

blocks.name: Float
blocks.comments: start color transition at this radius

blocks.name: Float
blocks.comments: create gradient from start to this radius for color transition

blocks.name: Lerp
blocks.comments: render in color in the middle of lifetime

blocks.name: Color4
blocks.comments: color at edges of screen
